name: RB Capital Renda I Fundo de Investimento Imobiliario - FII
summary: RB Capital Renda I Fundo de Investimento Imobiliario - FII is a Brazilian real estate investment fund that invests in income-generating properties. The fund distributes its income to shareholders and trades on the B3 stock exchange. The fund's purpose is to provide returns through rent and potential property value appreciation.
